case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY

docket_entries.description: MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION (SUMMARY JUDGMENT) VACATE FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BAIL BOND FILED BY DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY HEARING SET FOR JUL-25-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

ADDENDUM TO MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, VACATE FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BAIL BOND; SUPPLEMENTAL MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES WITH ADDITIONAL GROUNDS FOR RELIEF; DECLARATION OF BRAD PETERSEN FILED BY DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY

REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IN SUPPORT OF OPPOSITION TO MOTION BY REAL PARTY IN INTEREST TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, VACATE FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY'S MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, VACATE FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BAIL BOND. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THERE BEING NO COMPLIANCE WITH THE TENTATIVE RULING RULE, THE COURT DID NOT HEAR ARGUMENT AND ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DENIED. THE COURT DID NOT LACK JURISDICTION TO FORFEIT BAIL ON OCTOBER 30, 2007; THAT WAS WHEN MR. HOOD WAS REQUIRED TO APPEAR AND FAILED TO DO SO. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,180.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

calendar.matters:
Ntc And Motion To Vacate Summary Judgment, Vacate Forfeiture And Exonerate Bail Bond; Memo Of P And A; Declaration
Off Calendar Sep-17-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY'S MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, VACATE FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BAIL BOND is denied. Motion heard and denied on July 25, 2008. Plaintiff fails to comply with CCP 1008 for this renewed motion. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-25-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY'S MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, VACATE FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BAIL BOND

Appearances:
Brad Petersen of Allegheny Casualty International Fidelity Associate Bond (818-337-6088) for defendant and moving party

No other appearances on this matter. There being no compliance with the tentative ruling rule, the Court did not hear argument and adopted the tentative ruling as follows: denied. The Court did not lack jurisdiction to forfeit bail on October 30, 2007; that was when Mr. Hood was required to appear and failed to do so. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
